## C&P Support disclosures

Two pending proposals disclosed:
1. **MATHBAC** (this proposal) — DARPA-PA-26-05, $839,000, 16 months, ~10 person-months/year
2. **CLARA** — DARPA-PA-25-07-02-CLARA-FP-033, $2,000,000, 24 months, ~10 person-months/year

No active awards. No in-kind contributions ≥$5,000.

## User actions before final submission

1. Review both DOCX files for accuracy
2. Sign and date the C&P form (signature must be within 12 months of submission)
3. Add ORCID if you have one (currently listed as N/A)
4. Rename final PDFs to final staging names if required by BAAT upload field labels
5. Confirm whether BAAT requires a separate "Common Disclosure Form" or accepts biographical sketch + C&P as the full disclosure package
